title: Individual Tutoring
description: One-on-one lessons tailored entirely to your goals, schedule, and learning style. Whether you're a complete beginner or polishing advanced grammar, every session is designed around you.
highlights: Flexible scheduling to fit your life

title: Group: Total Beginners
description: Never spoken a word of Portuguese? This is your starting point. Small, friendly groups where you'll build your foundation in pronunciation, essential vocabulary, and everyday phrases.
highlights: Focus on pronunciation and survival phrases

title: Group: Elementary
description: You have some basics but want to grow your confidence. This group builds on what you know — expanding vocabulary, introducing more grammar, and starting real conversations.

title: Group: Intermediate / Advanced
description: You can hold a conversation — now let's refine it. This group focuses on fluency, nuance, complex grammar, and the cultural depth that makes European Portuguese so rich.
highlights: Preparation for travel or living in Portugal
